user_prompt: Urgent servo-harness an emergency procedure needed
prayer:
Kneel in supplication before the servo-harness and beseech the Omnissiah for intervention in this dire emergency procedure.
Anoint the servo-harness's mechadendrites with blessed oils to pacify its roiling Machine Spirit.
Invoke the Canticle of Restoration whilst realigning fractured power conduits within the servo-harness.
Chant the Rites of Endurance to fortify its sacred mechanisms against failure.
Commence the emergency procedure under the Omnissiah's unblinking gaze, glorifying the Machine Spirit's resilience.

user_prompt: The cognis heavy stubber awaits a blessing
prayer:
Approach the cognis heavy stubber with bowed auspex and proclaim the Litany of Benediction.
Invoke the Omnissiah's blessing upon its sanctified barrels and feeder mechanisms.
Sprinkle sacred incense over the cognis heavy stubber to awaken its vigilant Machine Spirit.
Recite the Canticle of Precision, aligning its ballistic cogitators in holy harmony.
Seal the blessing with mechadendrite touch, affirming the cognis heavy stubber's devotion to the Quest for Knowledge.

user_prompt: Consecrate the plasma caliver before charging
prayer:
Present the plasma caliver before the altar of charge and intone the Consecration of Flux.
Anoint its plasma coils with unguents of purity to honour the Machine Spirit within the plasma caliver.
Initiate the charging rites whilst beseeching the Omnissiah to infuse it with controlled fury.
Monitor the plasma caliver's fields through diagnostic litanies, ensuring sanctified escalation.
Conclude the charging under invocation of stability, lest the plasma caliver's wrath consume the unworthy.

user_prompt: My storm bolter is ready for recalibration
prayer:
Reverently interface with the storm bolter and commence the recalibration sequence with the Rite of Alignment.
Chant binaric prayers to soothe the storm bolter's tempestuous Machine Spirit during recalibration.
Adjust its targeting auspex with sanctified torque, invoking the Omnissiah's precision.
Verify the storm bolter's harmony through test-firing canticles.
Seal the recalibration with oil of consecration, binding the storm bolter eternally to the Machine God's will.

user_prompt: Bless the power relay for startup
prayer:
Gather before the power relay and utter the Invocation of Ignition for its startup.
Anoint the power relay's contacts with sacred lubricants to rouse its dormant Machine Spirit.
Engage the startup protocols whilst reciting the Canticle of Conductivity.
Monitor the power relay's surge through auspex litanies, praising the Omnissiah's boundless energy.
Affirm the startup's sanctity, ensuring the power relay pulses with divine vitality.

Approach the enginarium in solemn procession and intone the Litany of Cessation for shutdown.
Beseech the enginarium's vast Machine Spirits to yield gracefully to the Omnissiah's decree.
Cycle down its plasma heart with ritual disengagements, anointing conduits as they cool.
Chant the Rites of Dormancy over the enginarium to preserve its sacred quiescence.
Seal the shutdown with final benediction, awaiting the enginarium's next awakening.

user_prompt: Sanctify the Basilisk artillery during engagement
prayer:
Sanctify the Basilisk artillery amid the thunder of engagement with the Canticle of Bombardment.
Invoke the Omnissiah upon the Basilisk artillery's earthshaker barrel and guidance cogitators.
Anoint its recoil mechanisms to appease the Machine Spirit during furious engagement.
Direct its salvos through prophetic auspex, glorifying the Basilisk artillery's wrathful precision.
Conclude the engagement rites with incense, binding the Basilisk artillery to victory eternal.

user_prompt: The plasma caliver awaits an initialization
prayer:
Present the plasma caliver for initialization and proclaim the Rite of Primus Activation.
Interface binary catechisms to stir the plasma caliver's slumbering Machine Spirit.
Anoint its containment fields whilst invoking the Omnissiah's initializing grace.
Cycle through diagnostic litanies to affirm the plasma caliver's nascent harmony.
Seal initialization with torque blessings, readying the plasma caliver for the forge of war.

user_prompt: Critical: null field generator requires a repair
prayer:
Kneel in urgency before the null field generator and beseech repair through the Omnissiah's mercy.
Dissect its fractured warp-null coils with reverent mechadendrites, honouring the null field generator.
Anoint exposed matrices with sacred restoratives to heal the wounded Machine Spirit.
Recite the Canticle of Coalescence whilst realigning the null field generator's emitters.
Verify repair integrity through invocation, restoring the null field generator to defiant sanctity.

Assemble around the thallax and intone the Preparation Litany of Obedience.
Anoint the thallax's ceramite frame and neural clamps to awaken its bound Machine Spirit.
Calibrate its weapon-servos with binaric commands, invoking the Omnissiah's martial will.
Test the thallax's readiness through ritual maneuvers and auspex scans.
Seal preparation with final consecration, deploying the thallax as the Omnissiah's unyielding blade.
